name: HIPAA Transmission Security
description: Implement technical security measures to guard against unauthorized access to electronic protected health information that is being transmitted over an electronic communications network.
requirement_text: Implement technical security measures to guard against unauthorized access to electronic protected health information that is being transmitted over an electronic communications network.

content.notes: Encryption is an addressable implementation specification — covered entities must encrypt ePHI in transit or document why encryption is not reasonable and appropriate.
